assets.abstract: Substantial knowledge about asthma has accumulated in past decades from biomedical and psychobiological research. This white paper reports on synergistic perspectives for these fields discussed at the first Annual Disease-A-Year Symposium of the American Psychosomatic Society. Progress has been made in identifying mechanical, cellular and molecular mechanisms of asthma and influences of psychosocial factors on development, pathophysiology, and management have been demonstrated.
